title: Atlas Extras
description:
A Vanilla+ Resourcepack that changes certain textures and gives some Mobs Unique weapons all together.

(Part of a larger project)
body:
# Atlas Extras Resourcepack for Minecraft Java Edition
## 📖 About

This is a small, Vanilla+ Resourcepack designed to visually enhance the way the game looks and feels.
## 📝 Features

<details>
<summary>Texture Changes</summary>

- Wooden Tools now have a more "Carved" look rather than just being plain and brown.
- Diamond Tools, along with the regular Diamond, have a slight color improvement and minor texture changes.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mob Weapons</summary>

- Vindicators have a custom Iron Axe rather than the standard Iron Axe.

- Piglin Brutes have a Golden Battleaxe instead of a normal Gold Axe.

- Wither Skeletons have a Weeping Stone Sword, rather than their standard Stone Sword.

- Vexes have a small Iron Dagger instead of a small Iron Sword

</details>

## ❗Important Information

This Resourcepack is a work in progress, so all textures are subject to change at any time. Be sure to check the changelog. After every update
## 📂 Installation

Be sure to install this Resourcepack to the right location or it will not work properly.
## ℹ️ Extra Information

I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but never required.
## 👾 Bugs/Issues

Please report any issues to the Discord located in the Links tab, or on the Planet Minecraft page.
